title: Successful staff login redirects into staff portal and shows staff layout
description: Verifies that a valid email/password login redirects into the staff area and the staff layout is visible.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email address field
Verify element "Sign In" loading spinner is visible

title: Invalid password shows 'Invalid credentials' error and stays on login page
description: Verifies that incorrect credentials show a red error banner and the user remains on the login page.

steps.description: Type "fake.user@example.com" into the email address field

title: Login button shows loading spinner while signing in
description: Verifies that clicking Sign In triggers a visible loading state to prevent duplicate submissions.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email address field
Verify element "Sign In" loading spinner is visible

title: Empty submit shows validation and does not leave login page
description: Verifies that attempting to sign in with empty fields does not redirect away from the login screen.

title: Whitespace-trimmed credentials can still log in
description: Verifies that leading/trailing whitespace in credentials does not block a valid login.

steps.description: Type "  {{LOGIN_USER}}  " into the email address field

title: Pressing Enter in password field submits login
description: Verifies keyboard submission from the password field signs the user in and redirects into staff area.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email address field

title: Navigate directly to a staff route after login is allowed (staff area reachable)
description: Verifies that after a successful login, the user can access a staff page and sees the staff UI.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email address field

title: Non-existent user shows 'Invalid credentials' and keeps entered email visible
description: Verifies that a failed login for a non-existent account shows the error and preserves the email input for correction.

steps.description: Type "does.not.exist.999999@example.com" into the email address field

title: Browse QR menu header shows restaurant name and table indicator
description: Verifies the QR menu page loads and displays the restaurant name and the correct table chip for Table 1.

title: Browse menu categories via category pills scrolling
description: Verifies a customer can scroll through the category pills and see category names update/appear.

steps.description: Scroll to "End of category pills row"

title: Add a menu item to cart from item detail/card and see quantity stepper appear
description: Verifies adding 'Spring Rolls' shows a quantity stepper on the item card (or detail) indicating it is in the cart.

steps.description: Verify element "Quantity stepper for Spring Rolls" is visible

title: Sticky bottom cart bar updates item count and total after adding item
description: Verifies the sticky cart bar becomes visible and reflects an updated count/total after adding an item.

steps.description: Verify element "Sticky bottom cart bar" is visible
Verify element "Cart item count" is visible
Verify element "Cart total amount" is visible

title: View Cart from sticky cart bar and verify cart page shows items and notes input
description: Verifies customer can open the cart from the sticky bar and see cart items list and order notes input.

steps.description: Click on "View Cart" in the sticky bottom cart bar
Verify element "Cart items list" is visible

title: Place order success shows loading state then redirects to order status
description: Verifies placing an order shows a loading state on 'Place Order' and then navigates to an order status page.

steps.description: Click on "View Cart" in the sticky bottom cart bar
Verify element "Place Order loading state" is visible

title: Order status page shows created/initial stepper state after successful placement
description: Verifies the order status page displays an order status stepper starting at CREATED (initial state).

steps.description: Click on "View Cart" in the sticky bottom cart bar

title: Order status page shows initial CREATED step and stepper UI
description: Verifies the order status page loads and displays a visible status stepper with the initial CREATED state.

steps.description: Verify element "order status stepper" is visible

title: Status page remains usable while waiting for real-time updates
description: Verifies the page does not show an error state during normal waiting periods and keeps the stepper visible.

steps.description: Verify element "order status stepper" is visible
Verify element "order status stepper" is visible
Verify text "Unable to fetch order status" is not visible

title: Staff dashboard loads with sidebar, KPI cards, charts, and recent orders table
description: Verifies the dashboard overview renders all primary sections and shows non-empty KPI values, charts, and recent orders.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Verify element "Left sidebar navigation" is visible
Verify element "Recent Orders" table is visible

title: KPI stat cards show loaded numeric values and trend indicators
description: Verifies the four KPI cards render and display numbers with trend chips/indicators after loading.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Verify element "KPI" stat cards section is visible
Verify element "Trend" chip/indicator on a KPI card is visible

title: Revenue line chart renders on the dashboard
description: Verifies the revenue chart section appears and renders a revenue line chart after loading completes.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Verify element "Revenue" line chart is visible
Verify element "Revenue" chart legend or axis labels are visible

title: Top Items bar chart renders on the dashboard
description: Verifies the top-items chart section appears and renders a bar chart with item labels.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Verify element "Top Items" bar chart is visible
Verify element "Top Items" chart item labels are visible

title: Recent Orders table is populated with at least one row and key columns
description: Verifies the recent orders section loads and displays rows with recognizable order fields.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Verify element "Recent Orders" table header row is visible
Verify element "Recent Orders" table contains at least one visible row

title: Filter orders by search and open order details
description: Verifies the staff can search for an order from the orders list and open its slide-over details panel.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the main navigation

title: Search for a specific order number shows filtered results
description: Verifies typing an order number in search filters the orders table results.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the main navigation

title: Open slide-over order detail panel from an order row
description: Verifies clicking an order row opens the slide-over panel with order details.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the main navigation
Click on the order row for "Order#123"

title: Update order status successfully from slide-over panel
description: Verifies a role-appropriate status action (e.g., Confirm) updates the status shown in the slide-over and list.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the main navigation
Click on the order row for "Order#123"

title: Status filter tabs are visible and can be switched
description: Verifies the orders page shows status filter tabs and the user can switch filters to change visible results.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the main navigation
Verify element "Status" filter tabs are visible

title: Clearing the search restores the unfiltered order list
description: Verifies removing the search term returns the table to showing the broader list again.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the main navigation

title: Role-aware status controls are visible in the slide-over panel
description: Verifies the slide-over panel shows status actions appropriate to the logged-in user role (buttons present or absent).

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the main navigation
Click on the order row for "Order#123"
Verify element "Update Status" controls section is visible

title: KDS loads and shows header elements (restaurant name + live clock)
description: Verifies the Kitchen Display System page loads for an authenticated user and the fixed header shows key information.

title: KDS shows a grid of active tickets with CONFIRMED and IN_KITCHEN statuses
description: Verifies the main board renders ticket cards and includes both CONFIRMED and IN_KITCHEN orders when present.

title: Ticket shows elapsed timer and under-5-min timer appears in white (Order#123)
description: Verifies a specific ticket displays an elapsed timer and the timer uses the non-urgent (white) state for a new order.

steps.description: Verify element "Elapsed timer for Order#123" is visible

title: Start Cooking progresses Order#123 from CONFIRMED to IN_KITCHEN and keeps timer visible
description: Verifies the quick action updates the ticket status badge to IN_KITCHEN and the timer continues to display.

steps.description: Verify text "IN_KITCHEN" is visible within the "Order#123" ticket
Verify element "Elapsed timer for Order#123" is visible

title: Record a successful CARD payment from Billing page
description: Verifies staff can proceed to billing for a served order, select CARD, collect payment, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order

title: Record a successful CASH payment from Billing page
description: Verifies staff can collect a CASH payment for a served order and receive a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order

title: Record a successful UPI payment from Billing page
description: Verifies staff can collect a UPI payment for a served order and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order

title: Payment failure shows error toast and does not confirm success
description: Verifies that when collecting payment fails, the UI shows an error message and does not show the success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order
Verify text "Payment recorded" is not visible

title: Generate Invoice is available and produces an invoice view on Billing page
description: Verifies staff can generate an invoice from the billing screen and see an invoice view rendered.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order

title: Billing page shows order summary and totals panel
description: Verifies the billing screen loads with visible order summary content and totals section for a served order.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order

title: Cannot collect payment without selecting a payment method (validation)
description: Verifies the UI enforces payment method selection before collecting payment.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order
Verify text "Select payment method" is visible

title: Switching payment method updates the visible selection state
description: Verifies staff can toggle between payment methods and the currently selected method is visibly reflected before collection.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the staff navigation
Click "Proceed to Billing" on a served order

title: Analytics page loads with default Last 30 days view and renders charts + summary stats
description: Verifies the manager analytics page loads successfully and displays the default date range, charts, and summary statistics.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation

title: Analytics page displays Revenue and Orders charts when data is available
description: Verifies that the Revenue area chart and Orders bar chart are visible on the analytics page for the default range.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation

title: Analytics page shows summary stats: Total Revenue and Avg Order Value
description: Verifies that key summary statistic labels are visible on the analytics page.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation
Verify text "Avg Order Value" is visible

title: Re-selecting Last 30 days keeps charts and stats visible
description: Verifies that selecting the same predefined range does not break the UI and the analytics content remains visible.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation
Click on the date range picker control

title: Custom date range with no data shows 'No data for selected range' empty state
description: Verifies that when a custom date range has no results, the analytics page shows an empty state message.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation
Click on the date range picker control
Select a custom date range that is unlikely to have data (for example, a far past period) using the date range picker
Verify text "No data for selected range" is visible

title: Empty-state view still shows chart placeholders for no-data custom range
description: Verifies that chart areas remain present as placeholders even when the selected date range has no data.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation
Click on the date range picker control
Select a custom date range that is unlikely to have data (for example, a far past period) using the date range picker
Verify element "Revenue" chart placeholder is visible

title: Analytics page renders Top Items section in data-available range
description: Verifies that the Top Items section is visible for a typical date range where data exists.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation
Verify element "Top Items" list or chart is visible

title: Switching from no-data custom range back to Last 30 days restores charts
description: Verifies that after viewing an empty state, switching back to a normal range shows charts again.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign in" or "Login" button
Click on "Analytics" in the main navigation
Click on the date range picker control
Select a custom date range that is unlikely to have data (for example, a far past period) using the date range picker
Verify text "No data for selected range" is visible
Click on the date range picker control

title: Add a new staff user with WAITER role and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies that an authenticated staff user can add a new staff account and see it listed with the correct role badge.

steps.description: Click on "Users" in the staff sidebar or navigation menu

title: Complete Add Staff modal flow for WAITER role and verify new row is visible
description: Verifies the full add-user flow succeeds end-to-end from opening the modal to seeing the new user in the table.

steps.description: Click on "Users" in the staff sidebar or navigation menu
Type "Test Waiter" into the name field

title: Add a WAITER staff user and verify role badge is shown in the table
description: Verifies that selecting the WAITER role results in a visible WAITER role badge on the created user row.

steps.description: Click on "Users" in the staff sidebar or navigation menu

title: Prevent adding staff when email is already in use and show inline validation error
description: Verifies that submitting an existing email shows the "Email already taken" validation message and stays in the modal.

steps.description: Click on "Users" in the staff sidebar or navigation menu

title: Verify inline validation error text appears for duplicate email and modal remains open
description: Verifies the duplicate-email error is visible near the email field and the user is not navigated away.

steps.description: Click on "Users" in the staff sidebar or navigation menu
Verify text "Email already taken" is visible

title: Login required to access Users page: authenticated navigation shows users table content
description: Verifies that after successful login, the Users page loads and shows role-badged listing UI elements.

steps.description: Click on "Users" in the staff sidebar or navigation menu

title: Cancel out of Add Staff modal without creating a user
description: Verifies that the Add Staff modal can be dismissed and the user stays on the Users page without seeing success messaging.

steps.description: Click on "Users" in the staff sidebar or navigation menu

title: Generate a QR code for a valid table number and see it appear in the grid
description: Verifies a staff user can generate a table-specific QR code and sees a labeled QR card added to the grid.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the staff navigation/menu
Type "5" into the table number input field

title: Generate QR code should show a visible QR image/card for Table 5
description: Verifies the generated QR for a valid table number is displayed as a QR card/image in the grid.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the staff navigation/menu
Type "5" into the table number input field

title: Blank table number shows inline validation error and blocks generation
description: Verifies that submitting an empty table number shows an inline error and does not create a QR card.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the staff navigation/menu
Verify text "Enter a table number" is visible

title: Whitespace-only table number is treated as invalid
description: Verifies that entering only whitespace for the table number triggers validation and prevents QR generation.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the staff navigation/menu
Type "   " into the table number input field
Verify text "Enter a table number" is visible

title: Generating multiple tables creates multiple labeled QR cards
description: Verifies that generating QR codes for two different table numbers results in both QR cards being visible in the grid.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the staff navigation/menu
Type "5" into the table number input field
Type "6" into the table number input field

title: Generated QR codes persist after page reload (local persistence)
description: Verifies that previously generated QR cards remain visible after reloading the QR Codes page.

steps.description: Click on "QR Codes" in the staff navigation/menu
Type "5" into the table number input field

title: Super-admin updates Tax Rate and sees success confirmation
description: Verifies a SUPER_ADMIN can change the Tax Rate and save settings successfully with visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu

title: Super-admin sees settings form pre-populated on load
description: Verifies the settings page loads and displays existing saved values in the form fields.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu
Verify element "Restaurant Name" field is visible

title: Attempt to save invalid Tax Rate shows validation error
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when Tax Rate is invalid and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu

title: Attempt to save empty Tax Rate shows required-field error
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving when Tax Rate is cleared and shows a visible required/invalid message.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu

title: Non-super-admin is denied access to Restaurant Settings and redirected to dashboard
description: Verifies role guard behavior: access denied messaging appears and user ends up back on the staff dashboard.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu

title: Super-admin changes timezone and saves successfully
description: Verifies a SUPER_ADMIN can change timezone and save, receiving a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu

title: Super-admin changes currency and saves successfully
description: Verifies a SUPER_ADMIN can change currency and save, receiving a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu

title: Super-admin updates restaurant profile name and saves successfully
description: Verifies a SUPER_ADMIN can edit restaurant profile information and save with visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the staff navigation menu
Fill "Test Restaurant" into the "Restaurant Name" field
